testcase.name: search
testcase.system-out: Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Wishlist click is successful Wishlist button click is successful and moved to wishlist page Cart adding is successful TestCase4 passed with assertion

testsuite.system-out: Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully TestCase with Assertion passed Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Product added to cart is successful TestCase2 passed with assertion Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Wishlist click is successful Wishlist button click is successful and moved to wishlist page TestCase with Assertion is pass Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Wishlist click is successful Wishlist button click is successful and moved to wishlist page Cart adding is successful TestCase4 passed with assertion Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Wishlist click is successful Wishlist button click is successful and moved to wishlist page Cart adding is successful Quantity increase is successful Quantity decrease is successful Proceed To checkout button click is successful TestCase5 passed with assertion
